svg.title: Hamster notification catch v1 (scripted export)
svg.desc: Confirmed notification catch animation for the V18 hamster: envelope flies in from the left, hamster turns, catches it, waves it, and a tuned exclamation mark pulses with the wave before fading out. Confirmed by 鹿鹿 on 2026-06-09.
svg.metadata: { "export": "notification-catch-v1-scripted", "confirmedBy": "鹿鹿", "confirmedDate": "2026-06-09", "source": "drafts/notification-motion-v1/notification-catch-full-motion-v2/hamster-notification-catch-full-motion-v2.html?exclaim-soft-pulse=1780981200000", "master": "drafts/master/hamster-flat-layered-v18-noodle-hands.svg", "notes": [ "Self-contained scripted SVG: no fetch and no external image assets.", "Customer-preview export hides debug bones, labels, and envelope trail.", "Notification exclamation uses tuner values and soft three-beat pulse during envelope wave.", "Tie knot keeps its collar attachment; tie blade adds a tiny catch/wave inertial response.", "Scripted animation may not run when embedded as an img; use object/iframe or trusted scripted SVG runtime." ] }

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly), revealed by turn pages sliding sideways
